api_contract.description: API contract for controlling machines, simulating wear, and interacting with the Automation System AI.

start_machine.effect: State becomes 'active'. Machine begins generating production_rate.

overclock_machine.effect: State becomes 'overclocked'. Speed is multiplied by machine_def.overclock_effects.speed_multiplier. Wear generation is multiplied by machine_def.overclock_effects.wear_rate_multiplier.

assign_worker.effect: Sets assigned_worker_level. Efficiency becomes base * (1 + 0.03 * worker_level).

maintenance.effect: State becomes 'maintenance'. Machine stops producing. Deducts maintenance_cost_per_hour. Wear resets to 0 after downtime (default 60 seconds).

example_telemetry_logs.log_text: [14:00:05] Auto Harvester Mk 1 started. Base CPS: 10.
[14:01:00] WARNING: Auto Harvester Mk 1 OVERCLOCKED. Production +50%. Wear rate critical.
[14:05:00] CRITICAL: Auto Harvester Mk 1 broken down due to 100% wear. Entering forced maintenance (60s downtime, -25 Coins).
